home.hero_subtitle: BSF NutriFeed abinci ne mai araha da dorewa na kaji da aka yi daga ƙwarin Black Soldier Fly.
home.section_title: Daina Ɓatar Da Kuɗinka Akan Abinci Mai Tsada
home.section_body: Tun daga 2022, farashin abincin kaji na gargajiya a Najeriya ya tashi sama da kashi 60%. An gina BSF NutriFeed a matsayin amsa kai tsaye.
home.why_switch: Dalilin Da Ya Sa Manoma Ke Canzawa
home.edu_what_body: Ƙwarin Black Soldier Fly suna da yalwar protein da mai mai kyau. Suna ba da duk abin da kaji ke buƙata don girma da kuɗin da ya yi ƙasa fiye da abinci na gargajiya.
home.edu_safe_body: Ee. An gwada abincin BSF a kasashe da yawa na Afirka da Asiya. Manoma suna ba da rahoton irin yawan girma ko mafi kyau idan aka kwatanta da abinci na gargajiya.
home.edu_trust_title: Shin Zan Iya Amincewa Da Shi?
home.edu_trust_body: Manoma daga Lagos zuwa Kaduna suna amfani da BSF NutriFeed. Ƙorafin farashin abinci na gargajiya ya ƙaru tun 2024.
home.step1_body: Shigar da yawan tsuntsaye, matakin girma, da tsawon lokacin ciyarwa a cikin kalkuleta namu.
home.step2_body: Samu ƙididdigar adadin abinci nan take bisa bincike wanda ya dace da garken ka.
home.step3_body: Kula da samar da abinci, yawan girma, da faɗakarwa a lokaci na ainihi a kan allon sarrafa gonar ka.
home.quote_text: Tun da na koma BSF NutriFeed, farashin abincina ya faɗi kusan kashi 40%. Tsuntsayena suna girma da sauri kuma ina da kuɗi fiye da ƙarshen kowane wata.
home.quote_author: Amina Bello, Manoman Kaji — Jihar Kaduna
home.benefits_title: Inganta Lafiyar Kaji Tare Da Abinci Mai Tushe Na Bayanai
home.benefit1_body: Ya fi araha sosai fiye da abinci na gargajiya — yana rage kuɗin wata-wata.
home.benefit2_body: An yi daga sharar aiki, yana rage tasirin muhalli a kan al'ummar ka.
home.benefit3_body: Protein mai yawa daga ƙwarin BSF wanda ke tallafawa girma da sauri da kiwon lafiyar dabbobi.
home.cta_title: Shin Kana Shirye Ka Canza Gonar Ka?
home.cta_subtitle: Haɗu da manoma a fadin Najeriya waɗanda suka riga suna amfani da BSF NutriFeed.

calculator.title: Kalkuleta Abinci
calculator.subtitle: Ƙiyasta adadin BSF NutriFeed da garken ka ke buƙata bisa ga yanayin gonar ka.
calculator.how_works_body: Kalkuleta namu yana amfani da ƙididdigar shan abinci na yau da kullum bisa ga matakin girma na tsuntsayen ka.

dashboard.title: Allon Sarrafa Gonar
dashboard.subtitle: Duba kai tsaye na aikin BSF NutriFeed ka.
dashboard.alert_stock_low: Ajiyar abincin Farawa na raguwa. Yi la'akari da sake ajiyarwa a cikin kwanaki 5.
dashboard.alert_grower_stage: Tsuntsayen Rukuni na 3 suna shiga mataki na Girma wannan mako.
dashboard.alert_feeding_time: Lokacin ciyarwa na gaba: 8:00 AM gobe.
dashboard.alert_report_ready: Rahoton girma na mako-mako yana shirye don dubawa.

learn.title: Fahimtar Abincin BSF
learn.subtitle: Duk abin da manoman Najeriya suka buƙata su sani game da abincin Black Soldier Fly.
learn.article1_title: Dalilin Da Ya Sa Ƙwarin Black Soldier Fly Ya Zama Mafi Kyawun Tushen Protein
learn.article1_body: Ƙwarin Black Soldier Fly suna dauke da kashi 40-45% na danyen protein, kama da fishmeal. Kuma suna dauke da lauric acid, mai ɗanyen man da ke da halayen antimicrobial na halitta.
learn.article2_title: Shin Abincin Da Aka Yi Daga Kwari Yana Da Aminci Ga Kaji Na Najeriya?
learn.article2_body: Ee. An amince da abincin BSF kuma an gwada shi a kasuwanni da yawa na Afirka. Nazarin da aka yi sun tabbatar cewa babu sakamakon lafiya mara kyau a cikin kaji da aka ciyar da abincin BSF.
learn.article3_title: Rikicin Farashin Abinci da Dalilin Da Ya Sa BSF Ya Zama Mafita
learn.article3_body: Tun daga 2022, farashin abincin kaji na gargajiya a Najeriya ya tashi sama da kashi 60%. Ana iya samar da ƙwarin BSF a yankin ta amfani da sharar aiki da ƙaramin kayan aiki.
learn.article4_title: Yadda Abincin BSF Ke Rage Sharar Aiki da Matsin Muhalli
learn.article4_body: Kowane tan daya na ƙwarin BSF da aka samar yana canza kusan tan 2-4 na sharar aiki zuwa abinci. Wannan tsarin yana rage nauyin ƙasa da fitar da methane.
learn.trust_title: An Gina Shi A Kan Shaida, Ba Alƙawari Kawai Ba
learn.trust_body1: BSF NutriFeed yana da tushe a binciken noma daga cibiyoyi a fadin Afirka, Asiya, da Turai. Manoman suna ba da rahoton sakamakon daidai — ƙarin nauyi, ƙarancin mutuwa, da rage farashin abinci.
learn.trust_body2: Idan kana canzawa daga alamar abinci na gargajiya, sa ran lokacin daidaitawa na mako 2. Yawancin manoma suna ba da rahoton cikakken daidaitawa a cikin kwanaki 30.

privacy.title: Bayananku Na Ku Ne
privacy.subtitle: An rubuta cikin yaren da za a fahimta. Yana bin Dokar Kare Bayanan Najeriya 2023.
privacy.updated: An sabunta karo na ƙarshe: Afrilu 2026
privacy.summary1_note: Ba ga masu talla. Ba ga kowa.
privacy.summary4_note: Canza fifikon kukis a kowane lokaci.
privacy.section1_title: Abin Da Muke Tattarawa Da Abin Da Ba Mu Tattarawa
privacy.section1_body: Idan kana amfani da kalkuleta ba tare da asusu ba, ba mu adana komai a kan sabobin mu. Sakamakon ka ana adana shi a cikin mai bincike ka kawai.
privacy.section2_title: Dalilin Da Ya Sa Muke Tattarawa Da Abin Da Ba Mu Yi Da Shi
privacy.section2_body: Muna amfani da bayananku don gudanar da asusunka da keɓance shawarwarin abincin ka. Ba mu sayar da bayananku. Ba mu amfani da shi don talla.
privacy.section3_body: A ƙarƙashin Dokar Kare Bayanan Najeriya 2023, kana da haƙƙin samun dama, gyara, da share duk bayanai. Aika imel zuwa privacy@nutrifeed.ng muna amsa cikin awanni 72.
privacy.section4_body: Duk bayanai a cikin wucewar suna da rufin HTTPS. Ana adana kalmomin sirri ta amfani da bcrypt hashing. Idan akwai lamarin tsaro, za mu sanar da kai ta imel cikin awanni 72.
privacy.section5_body: Kukis masu mahimmanci suna sa ka shiga kuma suna tuna da saittanka. Kukis na nazari zaɓi ne kuma ba su da suna. Muna amfani da kukis na talla sifili.
privacy.section6_body: Aika imel zuwa privacy@nutrifeed.ng don duk tambayar bayanai. Muna amsa cikin awanni 48.
privacy.manage_body: Zaka iya sabunta izinin kukis a kowane lokaci.
privacy.reset_alert: An sake saita fifikon izini. Banner izinin zai bayyana a ziyarar ka ta gaba.

terms.title: Ƙa'idodin Amfani da BSF NutriFeed
terms.subtitle: Yaren da za a fahimta. Ba jargon na shari'a. An sabunta karshe Afrilu 2026.
terms.section1_body: Ta hanyar ƙirƙira asusu a BSF NutriFeed, kun yarda da waɗannan Sharuɗɗa da Yanayi. Idan ba ku yarda ba, kada ku ƙirƙira asusu.
terms.section2_body: Kana da alhakin kiyaye amincin abubuwan shaida na shiga ka. Kada ka raba asusun ka da kowa. Dole ka ba da bayanai daidai lokacin ƙirƙirar asusu.
terms.section3_title: Yadda Za Ka Yi Amfani Da App
terms.section3_body: Za ka iya amfani da BSF NutriFeed don dalilai na halal kawai da suka shafi sarrafa abincin gona. Kada ka yi ƙoƙari ka lalata dandali, ka shigar da bayanan ƙarya, ko ka shiga asusun da ba naka ba.
terms.section4_body: Kalkuleta abinci yana ba da ƙiyastoci bisa ga ƙididdigar shan abinci na yau da kullum. Waɗannan shawarwari ne kawai.
terms.section5_body: Bayanan da ka shigar a cikin BSF NutriFeed naka ne. Muna amfani da shi ne kawai don ba da sabis da inganta shawarwari. Ba mu sayar da shi ba.
terms.section6_body: Zamu iya sabunta waɗannan sharuɗɗan yayin da dandali ke girma. Idan muka sanya canje-canje masu mahimmanci, za mu sanar da kai ta imel akalla kwanaki 14 kafin su fara aiki.
terms.section7_body: Don duk wasu tambayoyi, tuntuɓe mu a legal@nutrifeed.ng. Muna amsa cikin awanni 48.
terms.cta_body: Idan wani abu a cikin waɗannan sharuɗɗan bai bayyana ba, tuntuɓe mu kafin ka ƙirƙiri asusu.

profile.title: Bayanin Kai
profile.email_hint: Ba za a iya canza imel a nan ba.
profile.history_desc: Duk ƙididdigar abinci da aka gudanar yayin shiga ana adana su a asusun ka.
profile.export_desc: Zazzage kwafin duk bayanan da muke da su game da ku.
profile.delete_desc: Share asusun ka na dace bayan taga aminci na kwanaki 30.

settings.title: Saiti
settings.feed_alerts_desc: Sami sanarwa lokacin da ajiyar abinci ke raguwa.
settings.weekly_report_desc: Karɓi taƙaitaccen bayani na ma'aunin gonar ka kowace mako.

language.title: Harshe
language.coming_soon: Fassarar cikakkiya na zuwa nan ba da daɗewa ba.

help.title: Nemi Taimako
help.message_placeholder: Bayyana tambayar ka ko matsalar ka...
help.sent_body: Na gode da tuntuɓar mu. Za mu mayar maka da amsoshi a cikin awanni 48.

consent.title: Muna girmama sirrin ka
consent.body: NutriFeed na amfani da kukis don sa aikace-aikacen ya yi aiki. Ba ma sayar da bayananka ba.
consent.essential_desc: Ana buƙata don shiga da kewayawa. Ba za a iya kashe shi ba.
consent.analytics_desc: Bayanai marasa suna kan abubuwan da manoma ke amfani da su mafi yawa.
consent.personalisation_desc: Adana fifikon kalkuleta ka tsakanin ziyara.

auth.login_subtitle: Shiga don duba allon sarrafa gonar ka da kayan aikin abinci.
auth.signup_subtitle: Bi diddigin ƙididdigan abinci ka, sa ido kan girma, kuma sami shawarwari na musamman.
auth.farm_details_desc: Ƙara cikakkun bayanan gonarka yana taimakon mu mu keɓance shawarwarinka.
auth.terms_agree: Na karanta kuma na yarda da
